entry_animations.name: fade_in
entry_animations.description: Smooth fade-in with slight scale-up (92% → 100%) for a clean and minimal entrance.

entry_animations.name: pop
entry_animations.description: Quick scale from 0 → overshoot → settle using ease_out_back. Clean and satisfying.
use_cases: Highlighting elements without being too dramatic

entry_animations.name: pop_in
entry_animations.description: Dramatic scale: 50% → 130% → 100%. Strong visual emphasis for important elements.

entry_animations.name: bounce
entry_animations.description: Drops from above and bounces into place using a realistic bounce curve.
use_cases: Casual or social media style videos

entry_animations.name: elastic_scale
entry_animations.description: Springy elastic scaling with strong oscillation. Very dynamic and energetic.
warnings: Use sparingly to avoid visual fatigue
Not suitable for professional or serious tone

entry_animations.name: slide_in_from_top
entry_animations.description: Slides down from above into position.

entry_animations.name: slide_in_from_left
entry_animations.description: Slides in from the left with slight overshoot.

entry_animations.name: slide_in_from_right
entry_animations.description: Slides in from the right edge into position.

entry_animations.name: slide_in_from_bottom
entry_animations.description: Slides up from below into position.
